stemHtml: Which statement is correct for a descent without engine thrust at maximum lift to drag ratio speed?

options.a: The mass of an aeroplane does not have any effect on the speed for descent.
options.b: The higher the gross mass the greater is the speed for descent.
options.c: The higher the gross mass the lower is the speed for descent.
options.d: The higher the average temperature (OAT) the lower is the speed for descent.
